arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Chelsea consider summer move for Aaron Ramsdale
arts.sum: Chelsea are considering a summer move for Southampton goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale, FootballTransfers has been told. However, FootballTransfers understands that Chelsea have internally discussed the possibility of rekindling their interest in Ramsdale ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window as they look to sign a new goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: 'They've both cost them points': BBC pundit says Chelsea have two players who simply 'aren't good enough'
arts.sum: Chelsea have suffered a downturn in form of late, which has seen them slip out of the Premier League’s top six. The Blues have lost...

arts.ttl: Southampton saw £6m bid to sign forward rejected in 2019, now he's a £50m star wanted by Arsenal
Double Chelsea team news hint dropped for Southampton as Enzo Maresca decision 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are. Injuries have impacted Enzo Maresca as of late with Nicolas Jackson joining key players like Romeo Lavia and Wesley Fofana as unavailable.

arts.ttl: Can Palmer rival Salah for FPL captaincy as he faces Southampton?
arts.sum: Salah has amassed 63 points over his last five matches, scoring six goals and supplying three assists. He delivered his second-highest score of 2024/25 Fantasy at St James’ Park in Gameweek 14, earning 18 points, thanks to two goals and an assist.

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive huge injury boost before Southampton clash
arts.sum: Chelsea receive a welcome injury boost ahead of the Premier League clash with Southampton.

arts.ttl: 'This is affecting': Paul Merson claims Chelsea are 'missing' another player besides Nicolas Jackson
arts.sum: Paul Merson thinks Chelsea are really struggling without one injured player in their team right now. The current Chelsea injury list does include some significant...

arts.ttl: Maresca handed MASSIVE boost that will SAVE Chelsea's season
arts.sum: After back-to-back season-ending knee injuries, the worry in December and early January was that Fofana would again be left sidelined for the remainder of the campaign, this time with a serious hamstring problem. Chelsea have been given hope of arresting their poor form by the news that Wesley Fofana is back from injury way ahead of schedule.

arts.ttl: Chelsea captain Reece James’ net worth, family ties in football, law graduate girlfriend
arts.sum: With a multi-million pound fortune and the Chelsea armband, defender Reece James is finally putting his injury woes behind him
